title: Add Workspace Icon in Quick Search modal

posts.author: djbeame (Bernard Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have duplicate (named) boards in different Workspaces for different clients.

We currently add a coloured circle icon to easily identify them when switching between boards.

If there were an option to display the Workspace icon in the Quick Search we could remove the circle icon. Not a major problem but just a suggestion.
